purpose: Define the exact production surfaces required before fixture-proven Nerdkle organs can be called production organism behavior.
source_truth_rule: GitHub origin/main remains canonical. Review branches and local daemons are evidence only until human-gated promotion.

required_surfaces.required_behavior: Receipt crawler writes timestamped Markdown files here.
Ender apoptosis flags unread packets older than 7 days into quarantine_list.json for manual Operator review.
blocked_organs: Ender production quarantine from primary outbox

production_go_threshold: At least one real LiveReceipt SUCCESS row is moved to speaker_queue and the same row remains in SQLite with ASSIMILATED true.
Fleyes scans real circulation.db and real world_state.json and writes frictional_heat.json from production inputs.
Ender scans real circulation.db and production outbox; any deletion or quarantine is logged to filtration_log.txt.
No docs/ deletion occurs without operator_signature.
All proof artifacts include path, byte_count, and sha256.
false_go_cases: Fixture proof is described as production proof.
DB_MISSING is described as healthy no-friction state.
A sent packet is described as a receipt.
A quarantine list is treated as deletion approval.
A local daemon running against fixture paths is treated as canonical organism life.
